nasb.text: May my prayer be counted as incense before You; The lifting up of my hands as the evening offering.

esv.text: Let my prayer be counted as incense before you, and the lifting up of my hands as the evening sacrifice!

cnv.text: 願我的禱告好像香安放在你面前； 願我的手高舉好像獻晚祭。

ccb.text: 愿我的祷告如香升到你面前， 愿我举手所献的祷告如同晚祭。

csbs.text: 愿我的祷告如香呈献在你面前； 愿我的双手举起如献晚祭。
